name: Clinical Infographic
tagline: White medical infographic template with line icons, circular callouts, blue accents, and clean research diagrams.

palette.description: white clinical surface with black line work, pale blue panels, and bright blue health accents

typography.style: rounded clinical sans with neutral body text

best_for: Medical explainers, health reports, research summaries, training materials, and decks where clarity matters more than drama.
avoid_for: Luxury brand decks, dark keynote stages, or highly emotional storytelling.

source_inspiration.name: Slidesgo Medical Infographics
source_inspiration.notes: Independent HTML/CSS interpretation based on public visual reference; not a pixel copy and does not reuse source assets.
